Repository context (unmerged; merge did not return text):

### Program.cs
Initializes ASP.NET Core Web Application. Conditionally starts Docker PostgreSQL in Development mode via `DockerOptions`. Configures NpgsqlDataSource with Azure AD token refresh for password management. Enforces JWT authentication requiring `JWT_SIGNING_KEY` environment variable (min 32 chars). Defines authorization policies for Admin and User roles. Configures rate limiting (100/min in Testing, 5/min otherwise) based on IP address. Registers SignalR, Repositories, Controllers, and RazorPages. Applies HSTS and HTTPS redirection outside Development mode. Maps `/chatHub` hub.

### appsettings.json
Defines local PostgreSQL connection string (`localhost`). Configures JWT options (Issuer, Audience, SigningKey, ExpiresMinutes=30, RefreshTokenExpiresDays=14). Sets default log level to Information. Allows all hosts.

### Configuration/JwtOptions.cs
Defines `JwtOptions` class with properties for Issuer, Audience, SigningKey, ExpiresMinutes, and RefreshTokenExpiresDays. Maps configuration section name "Jwt".

### Configuration/DockerOptions.cs
Defines Docker configuration settings for the backend API, including a default container name ("testnativemobile-postgres"), compose file path, and a startup timeout of 120 seconds.

### Controllers/AuthController.cs
Implements authentication endpoints for registration, login, token refresh, and revocation. Includes rate limiting on login/refresh requests and requires `ChatUser` policy for user profile retrieval and bulk token revocation. Handles validation errors and specific conflict states like duplicate usernames or emails.

### Controllers/ChatController.cs
Manages chat functionality via SignalR using the ChatHub context. Provides endpoints to retrieve recent messages (limit capped at 200) and post new messages which are broadcast to all connected clients. Requires `ChatUser` authorization policy for access.

### Hubs/ChatHub.cs
Implements a SignalR hub protected by the `ChatUser` authorization policy. Retrieves user ID from claims and saves messages to `IChatRepository`. Broadcasts "ReceiveMessage" events to all connected clients upon successful insertion. Throws `HubException` if the authenticated user lacks a valid ID.

### Services/AuthService.cs
Implements `IAuthService` handling registration, login, and refresh token logic. Validates username/email uniqueness during registration and verifies passwords via `PasswordHasherService`. Manages refresh tokens by revoking existing ones before issuing new rotated tokens upon refresh requests. Includes methods to revoke specific or all user refresh tokens.

### Services/TokenService.cs
Generates JWT access tokens using symmetric signing (`HmacSha256`) and creates refresh tokens with SHA256 hashes. Configured via `JwtOptions` for issuer, audience, and expiration times. Maps `AppUser` entities to `UserProfile` DTOs.

### Models/AppUser.cs
Defines the `AppUser` entity in `TestNativeMobileBackendApi.Models`. Properties include `Id`, `UserName`, `Email`, `PasswordHash`, `Role` (defaults to "User"), and audit fields (`CreatedAt`, `UpdatedAt`). Includes `AppRoles` constants for "User" and "Admin".

### Models/ChatMessage.cs
Defines the `ChatMessage` entity in `TestNativeMobileBackendApi.Models`. Properties include `Id`, `UserId`, `UserName`, `Message`, and `SentAt`.

### Interfaces/IAuthService.cs
Defines the `IAuthService` interface in `TestNativeMobileBackendApi.Interfaces`. Methods cover authentication flow (`Register`, `Login`, `Refresh`) and token management (`RevokeRefreshToken`, `RevokeAllForUser`). Uses DTOs from `Models.Auth`.

### infra/postgres/03-schema.sql
Defines PostgreSQL application schema with tables `app_users`, `chat_messages`, and `refresh_tokens`. Implements UUID primary keys, foreign key references to users, and unique constraints on user names and emails. Grants full CRUD permissions (`SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE`) to the `chatapi` service. Includes indexes on user attributes, message timestamps, and token expiration dates.

### docker-compose.yml
Configures PostgreSQL container using image `postgres:16-alpine`. Sets database credentials to user `chatapp`, password `chatapp_password`, and database `chatdb`. Exposes port 5432 and persists data in the `pgdata` volume. Loads initialization scripts from `infra/postgres` on startup and includes a healthcheck using `pg_isready`.
